title: "CLI Command Reference"
description: "Complete reference for all Cypher CLI commands and subcommands"

# CLI Command Reference

<!-- Auto-generated by script/generate-cli-docs.ts — do not edit manually -->

## cypher acp

```
start ACP (Agent Client Protocol) server

Options:
  --help         Show help  [boolean]
  --version      Show version number  [boolean]
  --port         port to listen on  [number] [default: 0]
  --hostname     hostname to listen on  [string] [default: "127.0.0.1"]
  --mdns         enable mDNS service discovery (defaults hostname to 0.0.0.0)  [boolean] [default: false]
  --mdns-domain  custom domain name for mDNS service (default: cypher.local)  [string] [default: "cypher.local"]
  --cors         additional domains to allow for CORS  [array] [default: []]
  --cwd          working directory  [string] [default: "."]
```

## cypher mcp

```
manage MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers

Commands:
  cypher mcp add            add an MCP server
  cypher mcp list           list MCP servers and their status  [aliases: ls]
  cypher mcp auth [name]    authenticate with an OAuth-enabled MCP server
  cypher mcp logout [name]  remove OAuth credentials for an MCP server
  cypher mcp debug <name>   debug OAuth connection for an MCP server

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

### cypher mcp add

```
add an MCP server

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

### cypher mcp list

```
list MCP servers and their status

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

### cypher mcp auth

```
authenticate with an OAuth-enabled MCP server

Commands:
  cypher mcp auth list  list OAuth-capable MCP servers and their auth status  [aliases: ls]

Positionals:
  name  name of the MCP server  [string]

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

### cypher mcp auth list

```
list OAuth-capable MCP servers and their auth status

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

### cypher mcp logout

```
remove OAuth credentials for an MCP server

Positionals:
  name  name of the MCP server  [string]

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

### cypher mcp debug

```
debug OAuth connection for an MCP server

Positionals:
  name  name of the MCP server  [string]

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

## cypher [project]

```
start cypher tui

Positionals:
  project  path to start cypher in  [string]

Options:
      --help         Show help  [boolean]
      --version      Show version number  [boolean]
      --port         port to listen on  [number] [default: 0]
      --hostname     hostname to listen on  [string] [default: "127.0.0.1"]
      --mdns         enable mDNS service discovery (defaults hostname to 0.0.0.0)  [boolean] [default: false]
      --mdns-domain  custom domain name for mDNS service (default: cypher.local)  [string] [default: "cypher.local"]
      --cors         additional domains to allow for CORS  [array] [default: []]
  -m, --model        model to use in the format of provider/model  [string]
  -c, --continue     continue the last session  [boolean]
  -s, --session      session id to continue  [string]
      --fork         fork the session when continuing (use with --continue or --session)  [boolean]
      --cloud-fork   fetch session from cloud and continue locally (use with --session)  [boolean]
      --prompt       prompt to use  [string]
      --agent        agent to use  [string]
```

## cypher attach

```
attach to a running cypher server

Positionals:
  url  http://localhost:4096  [string]

Options:
      --help        Show help  [boolean]
      --version     Show version number  [boolean]
      --dir         directory to run in  [string]
  -c, --continue    continue the last session  [boolean]
  -s, --session     session id to continue  [string]
      --fork        fork the session when continuing (use with --continue or --session)  [boolean]
      --cloud-fork  fetch session from cloud and continue locally (use with --session)  [boolean]
  -p, --password    basic auth password (defaults to CYPHER_SERVER_PASSWORD)  [string]
  -u, --username    basic auth username (defaults to CYPHER_SERVER_USERNAME or 'cypher')  [string]
```

## cypher run

```
run cypher with a message

Positionals:
  message  message to send  [string] [default: []]

Options:
      --help                          Show help  [boolean]
      --version                       Show version number  [boolean]
      --command                       the command to run, use message for args  [string]
  -c, --continue                      continue the last session  [boolean]
  -s, --session                       session id to continue  [string]
      --fork                          fork the session before continuing (requires --continue or --session)  [boolean]
      --cloud-fork                    fetch session from cloud and continue locally (use with --session)  [boolean]
      --share                         share the session  [boolean]
  -m, --model                         model to use in the format of provider/model  [string]
      --agent                         agent to use  [string]
      --format                        format: default (formatted) or json (raw JSON events)  [string] [choices: "default", "json"] [default: "default"]
  -f, --file                          file(s) to attach to message  [array]
      --title                         title for the session (uses truncated prompt if no value provided)  [string]
      --attach                        attach to a running cypher server (e.g., http://localhost:4096)  [string]
  -p, --password                      basic auth password (defaults to CYPHER_SERVER_PASSWORD)  [string]
  -u, --username                      basic auth username (defaults to CYPHER_SERVER_USERNAME or 'cypher')  [string]
      --dir                           directory to run in, path on remote server if attaching  [string]
      --port                          port for the local server (defaults to random port if no value provided)  [number]
      --variant                       model variant (provider-specific reasoning effort, e.g., high, max, minimal)  [string]
      --thinking                      show thinking blocks  [boolean]
      --replay                        replay visible session history on interactive resume  [boolean] [default: false]
      --replay-limit                  cap visible interactive replay to the newest N messages  [number]
  -i, --interactive                   run in direct interactive split-footer mode  [boolean] [default: false]
      --dangerously-skip-permissions  auto-approve permissions that are not explicitly denied (dangerous!)  [boolean] [default: false]
      --auto                          auto-approve all permissions (for autonomous/pipeline usage)  [boolean] [default: false]
      --demo                          enable direct interactive demo slash commands; pass one as the message to run it immediately  [boolean] [default: false]
```

## cypher debug

```
debugging and troubleshooting tools

Commands:
  cypher debug config        show resolved configuration
  cypher debug lsp           LSP debugging utilities
  cypher debug rg            ripgrep debugging utilities
  cypher debug file          file system debugging utilities
  cypher debug scrap         list all known projects
  cypher debug skill         list all available skills
  cypher debug snapshot      snapshot debugging utilities
  cypher debug startup       print startup timing
  cypher debug agent <name>  show agent configuration details
  cypher debug v2            debug v2 catalog and built-in plugins
  cypher debug info          show debug information
  cypher debug paths         show global paths (data, config, cache, state)
  cypher debug wait          wait indefinitely (for debugging)

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

### cypher debug config

```
show resolved configuration

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

### cypher debug lsp

```
LSP debugging utilities

Commands:
  cypher debug lsp diagnostics <file>      get diagnostics for a file
  cypher debug lsp symbols <query>         search workspace symbols
  cypher debug lsp document-symbols <uri>  get symbols from a document

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

### cypher debug lsp diagnostics

```
get diagnostics for a file

Positionals:
  file  [string]

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

### cypher debug lsp symbols

```
search workspace symbols

Positionals:
  query  [string]

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

### cypher debug lsp document-symbols

```
get symbols from a document

Positionals:
  uri  [string]

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

### cypher debug rg

```
ripgrep debugging utilities

Commands:
  cypher debug rg tree              show file tree using ripgrep
  cypher debug rg files             list files using ripgrep
  cypher debug rg search <pattern>  search file contents using ripgrep

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

### cypher debug rg tree

```
show file tree using ripgrep

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
  --limit  [number]
```

### cypher debug rg files

```
list files using ripgrep

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
  --query    Filter files by query  [string]
  --glob     Glob pattern to match files  [string]
  --limit    Limit number of results  [number]
```

### cypher debug rg search

```
search file contents using ripgrep

Positionals:
  pattern  Search pattern  [string]

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
  --glob     File glob patterns  [array]
  --limit    Limit number of results  [number]
```

### cypher debug file

```
file system debugging utilities

Commands:
  cypher debug file read <path>     read file contents as JSON
  cypher debug file status          show file status information
  cypher debug file list <path>     list files in a directory
  cypher debug file search <query>  search files by query
  cypher debug file tree [dir]      show directory tree

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

```
read file contents as JSON

Positionals:
  path  File path to read  [string]

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

Positionals:

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

```
show directory tree

Positionals:
  dir  Directory to tree  [string] [default: "."]

  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]

## cypher auth

```
manage AI providers and credentials

Commands:
  cypher auth list         list providers and credentials  [aliases: ls]
  cypher auth login [url]  log in to a provider
  cypher auth logout       log out from a configured provider

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

### cypher auth list

```
list providers and credentials

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

### cypher auth login

```
log in to a provider

Positionals:
  url  cypher auth provider  [string]

Options:
      --help      Show help  [boolean]
      --version   Show version number  [boolean]
  -p, --provider  provider id or name to log in to (skips provider selection)  [string]
  -m, --method    login method label (skips method selection)  [string]
```

### cypher auth logout

```
log out from a configured provider

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

## cypher agent

```
manage agents

Commands:
  cypher agent create  create a new agent
  cypher agent list    list all available agents

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

### cypher agent create

```
create a new agent

Options:
      --help                  Show help  [boolean]
      --version               Show version number  [boolean]
      --path                  directory path to generate the agent file  [string]
      --description           what the agent should do  [string]
      --mode                  agent mode  [string] [choices: "all", "primary", "subagent"]
      --permissions, --tools  comma-separated list of permissions to allow (default: all). Available: "bash, read, edit, glob, grep, webfetch, task, todowrite, websearch, lsp, skill"  [string]
  -m, --model                 model to use in the format of provider/model  [string]
```

### cypher agent list

```
list all available agents

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

## cypher upgrade

```
upgrade cypher to the latest or a specific version

Positionals:
  target  version to upgrade to, for ex '0.1.48' or 'v0.1.48'  [string]

Options:
      --help     Show help  [boolean]
      --version  Show version number  [boolean]
  -m, --method   installation method to use  [string] [choices: "curl", "npm", "yarn", "pnpm", "bun", "brew", "choco", "scoop"]
```

## cypher uninstall

```
uninstall cypher and remove all related files

Options:
      --help         Show help  [boolean]
      --version      Show version number  [boolean]
  -c, --keep-config  keep configuration files  [boolean] [default: false]
  -d, --keep-data    keep session data and snapshots  [boolean] [default: false]
      --dry-run      show what would be removed without removing  [boolean] [default: false]
  -f, --force        skip confirmation prompts  [boolean] [default: false]
```

## cypher serve

```
starts a headless cypher server

Options:
  --help         Show help  [boolean]
  --version      Show version number  [boolean]
  --port         port to listen on  [number] [default: 0]
  --hostname     hostname to listen on  [string] [default: "127.0.0.1"]
  --mdns         enable mDNS service discovery (defaults hostname to 0.0.0.0)  [boolean] [default: false]
  --mdns-domain  custom domain name for mDNS service (default: cypher.local)  [string] [default: "cypher.local"]
  --cors         additional domains to allow for CORS  [array] [default: []]
```

## cypher web

```
start cypher server and open web interface

Options:
  --help         Show help  [boolean]
  --version      Show version number  [boolean]
  --port         port to listen on  [number] [default: 0]
  --hostname     hostname to listen on  [string] [default: "127.0.0.1"]
  --mdns         enable mDNS service discovery (defaults hostname to 0.0.0.0)  [boolean] [default: false]
  --mdns-domain  custom domain name for mDNS service (default: cypher.local)  [string] [default: "cypher.local"]
  --cors         additional domains to allow for CORS  [array] [default: []]
```

## cypher models

```
list all available models

Positionals:
  provider  provider ID to filter models by  [string]

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
  --verbose  use more verbose model output (includes metadata like costs)  [boolean]
  --refresh  refresh the models cache from models.dev  [boolean]
```

## cypher roll-call

```
batch-test text models matching a filter for connectivity and latency

Positionals:
  filter  regex to filter models by provider/modelID (required)  [string]

Options:
  --help      Show help  [boolean]
  --version   Show version number  [boolean]
  --prompt    Prompt to send to each model  [string] [default: "Hello"]
  --timeout   Timeout for each model call in milliseconds  [number] [default: 25000]
  --parallel  Number of parallel model calls  [number] [default: 5]
  --verbose   Show verbose output  [boolean] [default: false]
  --quiet     Suppress progress and decoration  [boolean] [default: false]
  --output    Output format (table, json, or md)  [string] [choices: "table", "json", "md"] [default: "table"]
```

## cypher profile

```
show Cypher account profile

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
  --json     output profile as JSON  [boolean] [default: false]
```

## cypher stats

```
show token usage and cost statistics

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
  --days     show stats for the last N days (default: all time)  [number]
  --tools    number of tools to show (default: all)  [number]
  --models   show model statistics (default: hidden). Pass a number to show top N, otherwise shows all
  --project  filter by project (default: all projects, empty string: current project)  [string]
```

## cypher export

```
export session data as JSON

Positionals:
  sessionID  session id to export  [string]

Options:
  --help      Show help  [boolean]
  --version   Show version number  [boolean]
  --sanitize  redact sensitive transcript and file data  [boolean]
```

## cypher import

```
import session data from JSON file or URL

Positionals:
  file  path to JSON file or share URL  [string]

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

## cypher github

```
manage GitHub agent

Commands:
  cypher github install  install the GitHub agent
  cypher github run      run the GitHub agent

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

### cypher github install

```
install the GitHub agent

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

### cypher github run

```
run the GitHub agent

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
  --event    GitHub mock event to run the agent for  [string]
  --token    GitHub personal access token (github_pat_********)  [string]
```

## cypher pr

```
fetch and checkout a GitHub PR branch, then run cypher

Positionals:
  number  PR number to checkout  [number]

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

## cypher session

```
manage sessions

Commands:
  cypher session list                list sessions
  cypher session delete <sessionID>  delete a session

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

### cypher session list

```
list sessions

Options:
      --help       Show help  [boolean]
      --version    Show version number  [boolean]
  -n, --max-count  limit to N most recent sessions  [number]
      --format     output format  [string] [choices: "table", "json"] [default: "table"]
  -a, --all        list sessions from all projects  [boolean] [default: false]
  -s, --search     filter sessions by title  [string]
```

### cypher session delete

```
delete a session

Positionals:
  sessionID  session ID to delete  [string]

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

## cypher remote

```
enable remote connection for real-time session relay

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

## cypher daemon

```
manage the local cypher daemon

Commands:
  cypher daemon          start the local cypher daemon  [default]
  cypher daemon start    start the local cypher daemon
  cypher daemon status   show local cypher daemon status
  cypher daemon stop     stop the local cypher daemon
  cypher daemon restart  restart the local cypher daemon

Options:
      --help         Show help  [boolean]
      --version      Show version number  [boolean]
      --port         port to listen on  [number] [default: 0]
      --hostname     hostname to listen on  [string] [default: "127.0.0.1"]
      --mdns         enable mDNS service discovery (defaults hostname to 0.0.0.0)  [boolean] [default: false]
      --mdns-domain  custom domain name for mDNS service (default: cypher.local)  [string] [default: "cypher.local"]
      --cors         additional domains to allow for CORS  [array] [default: []]
      --json         print daemon details as JSON  [boolean]
  -f, --foreground   keep the command active until interrupted  [boolean]
```

### cypher daemon start

```
start the local cypher daemon

Options:
      --help         Show help  [boolean]
      --version      Show version number  [boolean]
      --port         port to listen on  [number] [default: 0]
      --hostname     hostname to listen on  [string] [default: "127.0.0.1"]
      --mdns         enable mDNS service discovery (defaults hostname to 0.0.0.0)  [boolean] [default: false]
      --mdns-domain  custom domain name for mDNS service (default: cypher.local)  [string] [default: "cypher.local"]
      --cors         additional domains to allow for CORS  [array] [default: []]
      --json         print daemon details as JSON  [boolean]
  -f, --foreground   keep the command active until interrupted  [boolean]
```

### cypher daemon status

```
show local cypher daemon status

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
  --json     print daemon details as JSON  [boolean]
```

### cypher daemon stop

```
stop the local cypher daemon

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
  --json     print daemon details as JSON  [boolean]
```

### cypher daemon restart

```
restart the local cypher daemon

Options:
      --help         Show help  [boolean]
      --version      Show version number  [boolean]
      --port         port to listen on  [number] [default: 0]
      --hostname     hostname to listen on  [string] [default: "127.0.0.1"]
      --mdns         enable mDNS service discovery (defaults hostname to 0.0.0.0)  [boolean] [default: false]
      --mdns-domain  custom domain name for mDNS service (default: cypher.local)  [string] [default: "cypher.local"]
      --cors         additional domains to allow for CORS  [array] [default: []]
      --json         print daemon details as JSON  [boolean]
  -f, --foreground   keep the command active until interrupted  [boolean]
```

## cypher console

```
open or stop the local Cypher Console

Commands:
  cypher console       open the local Cypher Console  [default]
  cypher console stop  stop the local cypher daemon

Options:
      --help         Show help  [boolean]
      --version      Show version number  [boolean]
      --port         port to listen on  [number] [default: 0]
      --hostname     hostname to listen on  [string] [default: "127.0.0.1"]
      --mdns         enable mDNS service discovery (defaults hostname to 0.0.0.0)  [boolean] [default: false]
      --mdns-domain  custom domain name for mDNS service (default: cypher.local)  [string] [default: "cypher.local"]
      --cors         additional domains to allow for CORS  [array] [default: []]
  -f, --foreground   keep the command active until interrupted  [boolean]
```

### cypher console stop

```
stop the local cypher daemon

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
  --json     print daemon details as JSON  [boolean]
```

## cypher db

```
database tools

Commands:
  cypher db [query]     open an interactive sqlite3 shell or run a query  [default]
  cypher db path        print the database path
  cypher db migrate     migrate JSON data to SQLite (merges with existing data)

Positionals:
  query  SQL query to execute  [string]

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
  --format   Output format  [string] [choices: "json", "tsv"] [default: "tsv"]
```

### cypher db path

```
print the database path

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

### cypher db migrate

```
migrate JSON data to SQLite (merges with existing data)

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

## cypher config

```
configuration tools

Commands:
  cypher config check  check configuration for warnings and errors

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

### cypher config check

```
check configuration for warnings and errors

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```

## cypher plugin

```
install plugin and update config

Positionals:
  module  npm module name  [string]

Options:
      --help     Show help  [boolean]
      --version  Show version number  [boolean]
  -g, --global   install in global config  [boolean] [default: false]
  -f, --force    replace existing plugin version  [boolean] [default: false]
```

## cypher help

```
show full CLI reference

Positionals:
  command  command to show help for  [string]

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
  --all      show help for all commands  [boolean] [default: false]
  --format   output format  [string] [choices: "md", "text"] [default: "md"]
```

## cypher completion

```
generate shell completion script

Options:
  --help     Show help  [boolean]
  --version  Show version number  [boolean]
```
